original_question: Which Colorectal trials had at least 4 arms and used Chemo/Anti-EGFR+Radiotherapy as control?
new_question: Which Colorectal trials had at least 3 arms and used a multikinase inhibitor as control?
new_sql:

FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Number of arms" >= 3 AND "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';

new_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Cancer type", "Primary endpoint"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'NSCLC' AND "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion" = 'Yes';
filters_added: "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion" = 'Yes'
filters_removed: "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion" = 'No'

SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung' AND "Number of arms" >= 4 AND "Control arm" = 'Chemo';

original_question: Which Colorectal trials evaluated Avelumab in phase 2?
new_question: Which Colorectal trials evaluated Durvalumab or Tremelimumab in phase 2?
new_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Durvalumab, Tremelimumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2';

original_question: Which Tremelimumab trials in Hepatocellular used Chemo/Anti-EGFR+Radiotherapy as the control?
new_question: Which Tremelimumab trials in Melanoma used Chemo as the control?
new_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Tremelimumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Control arm" = 'Chemo';

original_question: Which Urothelial phase 3 trials compared ICI to TKI?
new_question: Which Urothelial phase 3 trials used chemotherapy as a control?
new_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Control arm" = 'Chemo';

original_question: Which Ipilimumab trials in Bladder used Chemoradio as the control?

original_question: Which Esophageal/GEJ trials used Placebo as the control arm?

original_question: Which Pancreatic phase 3 trials compared ICI to Antibody-drug conjugate?
new_question: Which Hodgkin Lymphoma phase 3 trials used an antibody-drug conjugate as a control?
new_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen"

original_question: Which Small Cell Lung trials evaluated Durvalumab in phase 2?

original_question: Show NSCLC trials using PD-L1 where PD‑L1 positivity was an inclusion criterion.
new_question: Show NSCLC trials using PD-L1 where PD‑L1 positivity was not an inclusion criterion.
new_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Class of ICI", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'NSCLC' AND "Class of ICI" = 'PD-L1' AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" = 'No';

original_question: Which Colorectal trials used Radiation as the control arm?
new_question: Which Colorectal trials used a Multikinase inhibitor as the control arm?
new_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Control regimen", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';

original_question: Find Phase 3 Brentuximab-vedotin trials in Small Cell Lung that were original publication publications.
new_question: Find Phase 3 Brentuximab-vedotin trials for Hodgkin Lymphoma that were originally published.
new_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Brentuximab-vedotin' AND "Cancer type" = 'Hodgkin Lymphoma' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Original publication';

original_question: Show Nivolumab, Ipilimumab monotherapy trials in Mesothelioma with sample sizes.
new_question: Show Nivolumab and Ipilimumab combination trials in Mesothelioma with sample sizes.
new_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Total sample size", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Nivolumab, Ipilimumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';
